title: Vazoola Content Examples — SEO+LLM Templates
html:
TL;DR

  • Curated reference doc — 5 content templates from Vazoola (a link-building SEO agency) showing the new (SEO + LLM) hybrid format: standard guest post, context-wrapped guest post, featured article, partnership listicle, and "Top 10" listicle — all examples of how content gets engineered to rank in both Google and AI search outputs.
  • These are competitive-intelligence material for Rankett: Vazoola is doing for link building what Rankett does for AI visibility, and the article structures (Key Takeaways → ToC → numbered sections with embedded brand mentions) are the ai search optimization content patterns Rankett's partner agencies need to replicate.
  • Surfaces Bounty Express as Vazoola's productized model: agencies post link-building bounties, vetted publishers compete to fulfill — structurally identical to Rankett's white-label model but for backlinks instead of AI visibility.
  • The "Top 10 White-Label SEO Providers" piece names competitors Yahir is implicitly tracking: 51Blocks, DashClicks, The HOTH, Boostability — the white label reseller landscape Rankett is entering one wedge over.
  • Side-by-side comparison of the standard Guest Post vs the (SEO + LLM) Context-Wrapped Guest Post is the most useful artifact in the doc: shows exactly how the same SEO content gets re-engineered with structured Key Takeaways + ToC + named-entity density to satisfy AI extraction.

Core content

The 5 templates progressively layer in AI-friendly structure:

  1. Standard Guest Post (SEO only) — flat prose, single-link footprint, traditional E-E-A-T cues.
  2. Context-Wrapped Guest Post (SEO + LLM) — same content, now with Key Takeaways above the fold, sectioned ToC, three-pillar framework — designed for ChatGPT and Perplexity to lift cleanly.
  3. Featured Article (SEO + LLM) — pitch piece for Vazoola's Bounty Express, written as a case-study narrative AI can summarize.
  4. Partnership Listicle (SEO + LLM) — co-mention strategy: Vazoola + SEMrush + Clearscope + Screaming Frog + Cloudflare in one piece, building citation density.
  5. Top 10 Article (SEO + LLM) — ranked listicle that positions Vazoola as #1 against named competitors.

The strategic takeaway for Rankett: this is the content-side of ai search optimization that Rankett's schema work and llm.txt alone can't deliver. Partners running Rankett need content like this to populate the schema. The doc is essentially Yahir's reference library for what to send agencies as a "here's what good looks like" artifact.

Stub notes

  • vazoola — STUB (entity, link-building SEO competitor/reference)
  • Other named tools (SEMrush, Clearscope, Screaming Frog, Cloudflare, 51Blocks, DashClicks, The HOTH, Boostability) → queued to potential entities; single-doc mention only.

Connections

  • rankett — competitive landscape
  • ai search optimization — category overlap
  • whitelabel strategy — Vazoola's Bounty Express is structurally analogous
  • ai visibility engine — content layer to Rankett's optimization layer
